policy.description: Every reproduced product regression becomes a permanent CI usage scenario. Manual device testing is reserved for new behavior that is not represented here yet.

scenarios.description: Install the APK, launch Elephant and reject crashes, ANRs, permission interruptions and blank renderer surfaces.
scenarios.regression: Android white screen and startup camera permission

scenarios.description: Open search, type a query and return to the workspace.
scenarios.regression: Broken mobile search lifecycle and missing search.initVault

scenarios.description: Open and close Settings through accessible controls.
scenarios.regression: Settings surface inaccessible or oversized on mobile

scenarios.description: Open the navigation drawer and verify that the vault tree is exposed.
scenarios.regression: Drawer compressed the note grid instead of overlaying it

scenarios.description: Switch the note library between grid and list layouts, then restore the original layout.
scenarios.regression: Mobile layout controls were present but did not update the library

scenarios.description: Open the mobile sort sheet and select title ordering.
scenarios.regression: Mobile sort control opened no usable sheet

scenarios.description: Open the navigation drawer and enter the seeded Getting Started note.
scenarios.regression: Notes appeared in the tree but could not be opened on Android
